name: Levenhuk Inc.
summary: Levenhuk Inc. manufactures and sells optical devices and instruments. It offers telescopes, microscopes, binoculars, spotting scopes, magnifiers, monoculars, and accessories, as well as microscope slides, star charts, cleaning accessories for optics, and educational materials on natural science. The company offers its optics primarily under the Levenhuk brand name. It operates through a dealer network in the United States, Canada, India, Azerbaijan, Southeast Asia, and Europe. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tampa, Florida.
